name: Segmented
goal: Render a segmented control — a button row that acts as a single-choice radio group — for view toggles, time-range pickers, unit switches, and tab-flavored filters.
description: Joined-button segmented control backed by a radiogroup ARIA role. Accepts segments either as JSON via the data attribute (data-array mode) or as ce-segment child elements (slot-child mode); slot children win when both are present. Roving tabindex: only the selected segment (or the first when none is selected) is reachable via Tab; ArrowRight/ArrowLeft move selection with wrap-around. Form-associated; sets internal form value on every selection change. Emits ce-change with { name, value }.

props.name: name
props.description: Form-control name; echoed in ce-change detail.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected segment value. Empty string means no segment is selected.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of { value, label, icon? } objects. Used when no ce-segment children are slotted. Settable as a JS property or as a JSON-encoded attribute.

props.name: size
props.description: Visual size of the control. Affects height and horizontal padding.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the entire control. Individual segments can also be disabled via their disabled attribute in slot-child mode.

events.name: ce-change
events.description: Fires when the user selects a different segment.

slots.description: Optional ce-segment child elements. When present, slot children take precedence over the data attribute (CDR-005).

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Background of the selected segment button.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-inverse
cssVariables.description: Label color on the selected (blue) segment.

cssVariables.name: --ce-surface-3
cssVariables.description: Fallback hover background on unselected segments.

cssVariables.name: --ce-border
cssVariables.description: Outer border and internal dividers between segments.

cssVariables.name: --ce-focus-ring
cssVariables.description: Focus ring applied to each focused segment button.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition
cssVariables.description: Transition timing for background and color changes.

interchangeableWith.when: more than 5 options or hint text required per option

a11y.notes: Host carries role='radiogroup'. Each rendered button has role='radio' and aria-checked. Roving tabindex: only the currently selected segment (or the first segment when none is selected) has tabindex=0; others have tabindex=-1. ArrowRight / ArrowLeft move focus and selection; wrap-around at both ends. The control is form-associated and exposes its value through ElementInternals.

subComponents.description: Individual segment item used in slot-child mode. Attributes: value (string), label (string), disabled (boolean). Does not render visual output; the parent reads its attributes to build the button row.

additional.dualInputMode: When both data and slot children are present, slot children win (CDR-005). This allows incremental migration: start with data JSON, switch to ce-segment children later without changing the parent tag.
additional.noSelectionBehavior: When value is empty, no segment has aria-checked=true. The first non-disabled segment receives tabindex=0 so the control is still keyboard-reachable. A selection is only recorded after the user clicks or presses Arrow keys.
